description: Send the input to the node to the list of addresses provided

tag.description: The tag that the output message should be tagged with
tag.title: Message Tag

recipient_list.description: A comma-separated list of email addresses. Supports Python format strings, e.g. {participant_data.email}
recipient_list.title: Recipient List

subject.description: Email subject. Supports Python format strings, e.g. {participant_data.name}
subject.title: Subject

body.description: Optional Jinja2 template for the email body. If empty, the pipeline input is used. Available variables: input, temp_state, session_state, participant_data, participant_details.
body.title: Body

title: SendEmail
ui:label: Send an email
